# polaris_principal (Data Source)

Fetches a Polaris principal by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polaris_principal" "alice" {
  name = "alice"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the principal. Defaults to the client_id configured in the provider.

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID assigned to this principal by Polaris.
- `create_timestamp` (Number) Creation time as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
- `entity_version` (Number) Version of the principal object, used for optimistic concurrency control.
- `last_update_timestamp` (Number) Last update time as a Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds.
- `properties` (Map of String) Key-value metadata attached to the principal.
